about:
Hello! I'm a front-end developer driven by an insatiable curiosity about how things work, from websites to video games. My journey in tech began with a fascination for understanding and mastering the languages of code. This quest for knowledge led me to create my own websites and also delve into the realm of video game development.


Creativity is at the heart of what I do. I believe in the power of details; they're what transform good work into something extraordinary. Each day is an opportunity for me to be better than the last, refining my skills and pushing the boundaries of what I can create.


In this portfolio, you'll see not just my technical skills, but a reflection of my journey, a blend of creativity, curiosity, and a relentless pursuit of perfection.


Welcome to my digital canvas, where every project is a story of discovery and innovation.
